summary: cand_espd completed on GSM8K with accuracy=0.32, frontier_ratio=0.1211, speed=140.45 tok/s.

active_frontier_scoring_rule.definition: Normalized token entropy after the shared 64-step draft

frontier_retention_ratio.definition: Retain the top 12% highest-entropy draft positions as the active frontier

stopping_threshold.definition: Stop frontier revision once the mean masked-frontier entropy falls to <= 85% of the draft-frontier entropy

maximum_retained_steps.definition: Run at most 3 frontier-only revision steps after the draft

runtime_ledger_policy.definition: Count frontier selection, stopping checks, and extra forwards separately from the shared draft runtime

examples.reference_answer:
It was 3 inches tall after the first week.
After the second week, it was 2 * 3 inches = <<2*3=6>>6 inches tall.
After the third week, it was 6 inches + 4 inches = <<6+4=10>>10 inches tall.
#### 10

He climbed 420 branches in total because 105 / .25 = <<105/.25=420>>420
He climbed on average 60 branches a day because 420 / 7 = <<420/7=60>>60
#### 60

The hotel room is 1500*.2=$<<1500*.2=300>>300 more expensive per night than normal
So they paid 1500+300=$<<1500+300=1800>>1800 per night
That means she paid 1800*3=$<<1800*3=5400>>5400
The plane tickets cost 5000*2=$<<5000*2=10000>>10,000
So the total cost is 10,000+5400=$<<10000+5400=15400>>15,400
#### 15400

The popsicles cost 0.25*20=<<0.25*20=5>>5 dollars.
The ice cream bars cost 0.5*4=<<0.5*4=2>>2 dollars.
He paid 5+2=<<5+2=7>>7 dollars.
#### 7

He rents his car 10*3=<<10*3=30>>30 hour a month
So he makes 25*30=$<<25*30=750>>750 a month
That means he has a profit of 750-500=$<<750-500=250>>250 a month
#### 250

Of the 96 fourth graders, 43 are girls, so 96 students - 43 girls = <<96-43=53>>53 boys.
On Friday there were 53 boys - 4 absent = <<53-4=49>>49 boys.
#### 49
